name: Life Change Firm
description_short: Life Change Firm is a credit repair provider based in Houston, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 with 45 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Life Change Firm is a credit repair provider serving clients in Houston, Texas. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 45 reviews, Life Change Firm has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Houston area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Operating as a credit counseling service, accounting firm, business broker, Life Change Firm provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions.

When evaluating credit repair services in Houston, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Life Change Firm operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Houston, Texas area who are considering Life Change Firm should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
